message:
perf(render): quad-cell diff skip, same-row CUP elimination, ASCII PreparedContent fast path, and cached hyperlink policy

- diff.rs: introduce cell_quad_bits_eq() to skip unchanged 4-cell blocks
  without allocating sub-slices, remove redundant equality pre-checks in
  scan_row_changes_blockwise that duplicated inner logic
- presenter.rs: remove CUP from same-row cursor moves since CHA strictly
  dominates (saves the extra row field bytes); fast-path single-run rows
  in plan_row_reuse to avoid scratch buffer overhead; add ASCII fast path
  in PreparedContent::new() to avoid unicode_width lookup for chars in
  the printable ASCII range; cache hyperlinks_enabled bool to avoid
  repeated TerminalCapabilities method calls in emit_link_changes hot path;
  short-circuit emit_link_changes when no link is open and hyperlinks are
  disabled
- New tests: scan_row_changes_range late-change detection after equal quad,
  accumulate_tile_counts_range single-cell and multi-cell coverage,
  hyperlink_disabled_policy_noops and stale-link close verification,
  same-row CHA-vs-CUP cost assertions, plan_row_reuse single-run parity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
